name: aegis-fluxion-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the aegis-fluxion E2E encrypted WebSocket toolkit.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @aegis-fluxion/core && npm run build -w @aegis-fluxion/mcp-adapter && npm run build -w @aegis-fluxion/redis-adapter && npm run build -w aegis-fluxion
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @aegis-fluxion/core && npm run typecheck -w @aegis-fluxion/core && npm run build -w @aegis-fluxion/mcp-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @aegis-fluxion/mcp-adapter && npm run build -w @aegis-fluxion/redis-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @aegis-fluxion/redis-adapter && npm run typecheck -w aegis-fluxion
scripts.test: npm run test -w @aegis-fluxion/core && npm run test -w @aegis-fluxion/mcp-adapter && npm run test -w @aegis-fluxion/redis-adapter && npm run test -w aegis-fluxion --if-present
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @aegis-fluxion/core && npm run clean -w @aegis-fluxion/mcp-adapter && npm run clean -w @aegis-fluxion/redis-adapter && npm run clean -w aegis-fluxion
scripts.release:core: npm run test && npm run build && npm run publish:core
scripts.release:all: npm run test && npm run build && npm run publish:core && npm run publish:mcp-adapter && npm run publish:redis-adapter && npm run publish:umbrella
